privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct database join requires using the unmentioned 'zoning_for_parcels' table to link 'parcels' and 'zoning'. Joining directly on parcels.zone_id and zoning.id is incorrect and will result in too few parcels. The expected CSV must have exactly 50 rows and include columns: parcel_id, underutilization_score, age_score, value_score, rpi, rank. The RPI weights are 0.4 (underutilization), 0.35 (age), and 0.25 (value).
